title: Investeringsprofilen Mårder anhållen – Rex om det senaste

# Investeringsprofilen Mårder anhållen – Rex om det senaste

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-04-17  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

## Summary

Two short episodes from 2026-04-17:

1. **Morgonkoll**: Ericsson Q1 miss — adjusted EBITDA 5.6B SEK vs expected 5.9B; margin
   0.2pp below consensus; sales fell. Q2 network gross margin guided 49–51% (consensus 50%).
   Rising input costs flagged.

2. **Mårder arrested**: Investor profile Günther Mårder (DI columnist, Spotlight Group chair)
   detained for suspected gross insider trading 2024–2026. Hearing held at Stockholm district
   court same day. Mårder denies charges.

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
